description_long: This object is a single, elongated banana with a gently curved shape and a slightly angular, faceted surface. The peel is predominantly yellow with subtle brownish and greenish tinges, and there are faint, irregular marks along the length, suggesting minor surface blemishes. Both ends of the banana are capped, with the stem end appearing slightly lighter and the blossom end darker. The surface has a matte, semi-soft appearance, with no visible tears or splits in the peel. The banana's form is consistent and intact, with no commercial stickers or labels present. The object is visually clean and free from any surrounding debris.
description: A gently curved, yellow banana with a matte, slightly faceted peel and minor surface blemishes. Both ends are capped, and the peel is intact and free of stickers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the banana, with yellow peel and subtle brownish marks.
description_view_1: End-on view of the banana's stem, revealing the polygonal cross-section and lighter coloration at the tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the banana's curvature and the darker blossom end.
description_view_3: End-on view of the blossom end, showing a darker, capped tip and the banana's elongated body.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is intact with minor surface blemishes and no visible tears, splits, or signs of peeling. The texture appears slightly rough but unbroken.
